backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (welcome popup, landing page, subsidiary cards, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and module script entry point, titled 'Luminia Group'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer on a black background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Premium black-and-gold footer displaying the Luminia Group logo, a portfolio brand list, contact links, and a dynamic copyright year with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, multi-layer obsidian overlay, gold Cormorant Garamond typography, a diamond divider, descriptive copy, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to subsidiaries.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Scroll-animated manifesto section featuring a radial gold glow, decorative divider rules, a large italic blockquote in gold, and a stats row showing 7 subsidiaries, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth scroll-to-section links, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with animated transitions.
A 'Coming Soon' placeholder page with fade-in animation, gold decorative elements, and the Luminia Group branding.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: Modal overlay component that displays detailed information and an image carousel for a selected subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and animated open/close transitions.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia Group subsidiaries and renders them as a scroll-animated grid, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: Full-screen welcome splash shown once per session, featuring staggered letter animations, falling gold particles, and a ripple-effect 'Enter' button that triggers an exit burst animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no implementation, noting that no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining the black-and-gold luxury theme with CSS variables, Tailwind imports, custom scrollbar/selection styles, and keyframe animations (particles, shimmer, ripple, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with gold/obsidian/ivory color palettes, Cormorant Garamond serif fonts, zero border-radius defaults, luxury box shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Luminia Group Conglomerate website's features, architecture, required images, and the 7 company cards with their modals in a black-and-gold luxury theme.
